title: Use AirTable as a monday data source
excerpt:
Hello Colleagues, 
I’m using Air-Table as a database for my work and wont to integrate it with Monday via Zapier. But I don’t know how I can use the data records inside air-table as a drop-down field in Monday. can anyon…

posts.author: MariamRushdi (Mariam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Colleagues,
I’m using Air-Table as a database for my work and wont to integrate it with Monday via Zapier. But I don’t know how I can use the data records inside air-table as a drop-down field in Monday. can anyone help?

posts.author: WCC_Susan (Susan Macmillan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would also like guidance on this. There are fields that I would like to map between Airtable and Monday that I don’t seem able to.

If anyone has any helpful insight I would be very grateful but please don’t suggest paid apps, as we are a non-profit and I need to keep our costs as low as possible.
